rows.label: qev091903_MSG0002
rows.name: So? Is this gear a keeper or what?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0003
rows.name:
Mmm...not great. Too soon to
call it, though. I'll ask a
few other teams to run tests.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0004
rows.name: What?! You seriously might shelve it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0005
rows.name: I thought it felt really good out there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0006
rows.name: Yeah, it's a tough business.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0007
rows.name:
But results aside, the test was carried
out perfectly. You both did a great job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0008
rows.name:
If the project gets cut,
it'll be due to my design.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0009
rows.name:
Aw, Tika. Well, hang in
there. Think positive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0010
rows.name: I try.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0011
rows.name:
And maybe think about
making a Doll weapon?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0012
rows.name: I'll consider considering it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0013
rows.name: That's... Wait, is that good?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0014
rows.name: Well, whatever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0015_m
rows.name:
At least I got a new partner
out of it. I'm looking forward
to our next assignment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0015_f
rows.name:
At least I got a new partner
out of it. I'm looking forward
to our next assignment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0017
rows.name: And? How's it look?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0018
rows.name:
The data? It's great. Especially
since you decided to go up
against a tougher target.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0019
rows.name:
That fight made it clear
that this prototype is—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0020
rows.name: Your masterpiece![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0021
rows.name: A piece of crap.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0022
rows.name: Aw, boo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0023
rows.name:
I can't believe I blew half our
budget and rare materials on this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0024
rows.name:
But the results don't lie. From a
cost-performance standpoint, it's awful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0025
rows.name:
I'm canceling the project and
mothballing the prototype unit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0026
rows.name: I mean, unless you want to keep it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0027
rows.name: Man, this blows.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0028
rows.name:
Yeah, it's a tough business. But the
test was carried out perfectly. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0029
rows.name: It's my design that was flawed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0030
rows.name: Well, I know you'll nail it next time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0031
rows.name: I'll try.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0032
rows.name:
And maybe think about
making a Doll weapon?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0033
rows.name: I'll consider considering it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0034
rows.name: That's... Wait, is that good?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0035
rows.name: Well, whatever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0036_m
rows.name:
At least I got a new partner
out of it. I'm looking forward
to our next assignment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0036_f
rows.name:
At least I got a new partner
out of it. I'm looking forward
to our next assignment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0037
rows.name:
Oh, and I should hope this is rather obvious,
but if you don't equip the ramjet rifle
while you fight, I can't get any data.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0038
rows.name:
So double-check your equipment
before you start picking fights
with the locals, all right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0039
rows.name:
Nice work out there. Let me take
that ramjet rifle off you now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0040
rows.name: Thank you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0040_2
rows.name: Also, I'm done analyzing your test data.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091903_MSG0041
rows.name:
Welcome back, and thanks for the hard
work. Can I ask you to unequip the
ramjet rifle and return it to me now?[ST:wait ]
